inputs.text: RAW photo, ultra realistic skin texture, stunning Korean idol woman with ash brown side-swept long hair cascading over one shoulder, heart-shaped face with full lips, serene contemplative expression gazing softly into distance. School uniform inspired preppy look with navy blazer and pleated skirt, standing small in frame within vast flower field at sunrise. Wide environmental portrait, ground-level upward shot capturing endless blooms stretching toward golden horizon. Single spotlight beam cutting through soft morning mist illuminating her figure against darkness of pre-dawn sky. Macro lens capturing extreme close-up skin texture details, visible pores, dewy highlight on cheekbones. Flawless styled makeup, gradient coral lips, natural flush. Atmospheric, cinematic, ethereal solitude. Window light quality, no text, no watermarks.
